$comment: ADR 0017 — bindgen lockfile. Pins the provenance + content hash of the generated FFI surface so CI (bindgen.yml / bindgen.test.ts) fails on any drift between the spec and the three emitted sites. Performance.now() is now generated from real Web IDL via the webidl2 adapter; Math.*/Date.now() are ECMAScript built-ins from the hand-authored table.

toolchain.note: All source adapters are spec-driven: Web from @webref/idl via webidl2 (adapters/webref.ts + webidl.ts); Node from @types/node and Bun from bun-types via the TypeScript compiler API (adapters/dts.ts). Math.*/Date.now() are ECMAScript built-ins with no machine-readable spec and stay hand-authored. The sha256 below pins the SHIPPED web Math/clock surface; per-source corpus pinning (@webref snapshot hash) arrives with the multi-module generation.
